index.title: Vicket - The Reference Nuxt 4 Implementation
index.description: Discover how to integrate the power of Vicket into your Nuxt 4 applications with industrial architecture and total white-labeling.

hero.description: The reference implementation of the Vicket Support Layer for Nuxt 4.

white_label.title: White-Label Support
white_label.desc: Customizable UI components that blend natively into your product.

workflows.title: Automated Workflows
workflows.desc: Integrate time-based and manual processes to automate your customer support.

scoring.title: Intelligent Scoring
scoring.desc: Priority algorithm based on real signals to treat urgent matters first.

teams.title: Team Visibility
teams.desc: Compartmentalize support by departments (Engineering, Sales, L1 Support).

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.desc: Reduce ticket volume by enabling intelligent client self-service.

developer_first.title: Developer-First
developer_first.desc: SOLID architecture and rich documentation for integration in minutes.

tech.description: Vicket was designed with a Contract-First approach. Thanks to a modular architecture and CSS Variables, your help center adapts to any visual identity while ensuring total stability.
